title: Authors and Citation
text: Lifshitz (2026). tgppt: Tanay Group Powerpoint Utils. R package version 0.1.0, https://tanaylab.github.io/tgppt/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {tgppt: Tanay Group Powerpoint Utils},   author = {Aviezer Lifshitz},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://tanaylab.github.io/tgppt/}, }

title: Tanay Group Powerpoint Utils
text: goal tgppt provide handy functions plot directly Powerpoint R. based magnificent officer package David Gohel.

title: Tanay Group Powerpoint Utils
text: can install tgppt :
code: remotes::install_github("tanaylab/tgppt")

title: Tanay Group Powerpoint Utils
text: Plot base R directly Powerpoint presentation: Plot ggplot Powerpoint presentation: Create new Powerpoint file: Use “Arial” font based ggplot theme:
code: library(tgppt) temp_ppt <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") plot_base_ppt({plot(mtcars$mpg, mtcars$drat)}, temp_ppt) library(tgppt) library(ggplot2) gg <- ggplot(mtcars, aes(x=mpg, y=drat)) + geom_point() temp_ppt <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") plot_gg_ppt(gg, temp_ppt) library(tgppt) new_ppt("myfile.pptx") ggplot2::theme_set(theme_arial(8))

title: Tanay Group Powerpoint Utils
text: Powerpoint might crash plotting large number points. avoid , set rasterize_plot TRUE:
code: plot_gg_ppt(gg, temp_ppt, rasterize_plot = TRUE)

what: Add a table to a PowerPoint slide — add_table_ppt
title: Add a table to a PowerPoint slide — add_table_ppt
text: Creates formatted table PowerPoint slide using flextable package.

title: Add a table to a PowerPoint slide — add_table_ppt
code: add_table_ppt(   df,   out_ppt,   left = 2,   top = 4,   width = 25,   height = 15,   inches = FALSE,   title = NULL,   title_fp = NULL,   template = NULL,   new_slide = FALSE,   overwrite = FALSE,   font_size = 10,   header_bold = TRUE,   header_bg = "#4472C4",   header_color = "white",   alternating_rows = TRUE,   even_row_bg = "#D9E2F3" )

title: Add a table to a PowerPoint slide — add_table_ppt
text: df data frame render table out_ppt output pptx file left left position cm (inches inches = TRUE) top top position cm (inches inches = TRUE) width width table cm (inches inches = TRUE) height height table cm (inches inches = TRUE) inches logical; TRUE, dimensions inches instead cm title optional slide title string. NULL, title text box placed table. title_fp fp_text object controlling title font properties. NULL (default), uses 18pt bold ArialMT. template path custom pptx template file. NULL, uses getOption("tgppt.template") set, otherwise bundled template. new_slide logical; add table new slide overwrite logical; overwrite existing file font_size font size table text header_bold logical; TRUE, header row text bold header_bg background colour header row header_color text colour header row alternating_rows logical; TRUE, even rows get coloured background even_row_bg background colour even rows alternating_rows = TRUE

title: Add a table to a PowerPoint slide — add_table_ppt
text: invisible; called side effect writing pptx file.

title: Add a table to a PowerPoint slide — add_table_ppt
code: temp_ppt <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") add_table_ppt(head(mtcars), temp_ppt)

title: Generate an empty pptx file — new_ppt
text: fn file name new pptx file template path custom pptx template file. NULL, uses getOption("tgppt.template") set, otherwise bundled template.

title: Generate an empty pptx file — new_ppt
text: logical value indicating operation succeeded

title: Generate an empty pptx file — new_ppt
code: ppt_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") new_ppt(ppt_file) #> [1] TRUE

code: lhs %>% rhs

what: Plot base R plots to ppt — plot_base_ppt
title: Plot base R plots to ppt — plot_base_ppt
text: Plot base R plots ppt

title: Plot base R plots to ppt — plot_base_ppt
code: plot_base_ppt(   code,   out_ppt,   height = 6,   width = 6,   left = 5,   top = 5,   inches = FALSE,   new_slide = FALSE,   overwrite = FALSE,   template = NULL,   title = NULL,   title_fp = NULL )

title: Plot base R plots to ppt — plot_base_ppt
text: code code generates plot out_ppt output pptx file height height cm width width cm left left alignment cm top top alignment cm inches measures given inches new_slide add plot new slide overwrite overwrite existing file template path custom pptx template file. NULL, uses getOption("tgppt.template") set, otherwise bundled template. title optional slide title string. NULL, title text box placed plot. title_fp fp_text object controlling title font properties. NULL (default), uses 18pt bold ArialMT.

title: Plot base R plots to ppt — plot_base_ppt
text: invisible; called side effect writing pptx file.

title: Plot base R plots to ppt — plot_base_ppt
code: temp_ppt <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") plot_base_ppt(     {         plot(mtcars$mpg, mtcars$drat)     },     temp_ppt )

what: Plot ggplot object to ppt — plot_gg_ppt
title: Plot ggplot object to ppt — plot_gg_ppt
text: Plot ggplot object ppt

title: Plot ggplot object to ppt — plot_gg_ppt
code: plot_gg_ppt(   gg,   out_ppt,   height = 6,   width = 6,   left = 5,   top = 5,   inches = FALSE,   sep_legend = FALSE,   transparent_bg = TRUE,   rasterize_plot = FALSE,   rasterize_legend = FALSE,   rasterize_text = FALSE,   rasterize_geoms = NULL,   res = 300,   new_slide = FALSE,   overwrite = FALSE,   legend_height = NULL,   legend_width = NULL,   legend_left = NULL,   legend_top = NULL,   tmpdir = tempdir(),   template = NULL,   title = NULL,   title_fp = NULL )

title: Plot ggplot object to ppt — plot_gg_ppt
text: gg ggplot object out_ppt output pptx file height height cm width width cm left left alignment cm top top alignment cm inches measures given inches sep_legend plot legend plot separately transparent_bg make background plot transparent rasterize_plot rasterize plotting panel rasterize_legend rasterize legend panel. Works sep_legend=TRUE rasterize_plot=TRUE rasterize_text rasterize text elements (geom_text, geom_label, geom_text_repel, etc.) within panel. FALSE (default), text grobs kept vector graphics even rasterize_plot=TRUE. rasterize_geoms character vector geom name prefixes selectively rasterize (e.g., c("geom_point", "geom_tile")). NULL, matching geom layers within panel grobs rasterized PNG remaining geom layers rendered vector DML. Setting implicitly enables rasterize_plot. res resolution png used generate rasterized plot new_slide add plot new slide overwrite overwrite existing file legend_height, legend_width, legend_left, legend_top legend position size case sep_legend=TRUE. Similar height,width,left top. default - legend plotted right plot. tmpdir temporary directory store rasterized png intermediate files template path custom pptx template file. NULL, uses getOption("tgppt.template") set, otherwise bundled template. title optional slide title string. NULL, title text box placed plot. title_fp fp_text object controlling title font properties. NULL (default), uses 18pt bold ArialMT.

title: Plot ggplot object to ppt — plot_gg_ppt
text: invisible; called side effect writing pptx file.

title: Plot ggplot object to ppt — plot_gg_ppt
code: library(ggplot2) gg <- ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = mpg, y = drat)) +     geom_point() temp_ppt <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") plot_gg_ppt(gg, temp_ppt)

what: Plot a list of ggplot objects to a PowerPoint file, one per slide — plot_list_ppt
title: Plot a list of ggplot objects to a PowerPoint file, one per slide — plot_list_ppt
text: Creates PowerPoint file one slide per plot. plot rendered via plot_gg_ppt, options (rasterisation, transparent background, etc.) available via ....

title: Plot a list of ggplot objects to a PowerPoint file, one per slide — plot_list_ppt
code: plot_list_ppt(   plots,   out_ppt,   titles = NULL,   template = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   ... )

title: Plot a list of ggplot objects to a PowerPoint file, one per slide — plot_list_ppt
text: plots list ggplot objects out_ppt output pptx file titles optional character vector slide titles, one per plot. NULL, must length plots. template path custom pptx template file. NULL, uses getOption("tgppt.template") set, otherwise bundled template. overwrite overwrite existing file ... additional arguments passed plot_gg_ppt (e.g. height, width, left, top, rasterize_plot).

title: Plot a list of ggplot objects to a PowerPoint file, one per slide — plot_list_ppt
text: invisible NULL

title: Plot a list of ggplot objects to a PowerPoint file, one per slide — plot_list_ppt
code: library(ggplot2) plots <- list(     ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = mpg, y = drat)) + geom_point(),     ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = qsec)) + geom_point(),     ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = hp, y = mpg)) + geom_point() ) temp_ppt <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") plot_list_ppt(plots, temp_ppt)  # With per-slide titles temp_ppt2 <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") plot_list_ppt(plots, temp_ppt2, titles = c("Plot 1", "Plot 2", "Plot 3"))

what: Plot multiple ggplot objects on a single slide — plot_multi_gg_ppt
title: Plot multiple ggplot objects on a single slide — plot_multi_gg_ppt
text: Arrange several ggplot objects grid layout one PowerPoint slide. plot placed using plot_gg_ppt, options (rasterisation, transparent background, etc.) available via ....

title: Plot multiple ggplot objects on a single slide — plot_multi_gg_ppt
code: plot_multi_gg_ppt(   plots,   out_ppt,   ncol = NULL,   nrow = NULL,   titles = NULL,   height = NULL,   width = NULL,   left = 0.5,   top = 0.5,   slide_width = NULL,   slide_height = NULL,   template = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   new_slide = FALSE,   ... )

title: Plot multiple ggplot objects on a single slide — plot_multi_gg_ppt
text: plots list ggplot objects out_ppt output pptx file ncol number columns grid. NULL, defaults ceiling(sqrt(length(plots))). nrow number rows grid. NULL, defaults ceiling(length(plots) / ncol). titles optional character vector titles, one per plot. NULL, titles[[]] passed title plot_gg_ppt -th plot. height height cell cm. NULL, computed slide_height, top, nrow. width width cell cm. NULL, computed slide_width, left, ncol. left left margin cm top top margin cm slide_width total slide width cm. NULL (default), read template. slide_height total slide height cm. NULL (default), read template. template path custom pptx template file. NULL, uses getOption("tgppt.template") set, otherwise bundled template. overwrite overwrite existing file new_slide add plots new slide ... additional arguments passed plot_gg_ppt (e.g. transparent_bg, rasterize_plot).

title: Plot multiple ggplot objects on a single slide — plot_multi_gg_ppt
text: invisible NULL

title: Plot multiple ggplot objects on a single slide — plot_multi_gg_ppt
code: library(ggplot2) plots <- list(     ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = mpg, y = drat)) + geom_point(),     ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = qsec)) + geom_point() ) temp_ppt <- tempfile(fileext = ".pptx") plot_multi_gg_ppt(plots, temp_ppt)

title: tgppt 0.1.0
text: Custom template path support: set default template via options(tgppt.template = "/path//template.pptx") pass template parameter directly new_ppt(), plot_gg_ppt(), plot_base_ppt(), functions. Slide title support: new title title_fp parameters plot_gg_ppt(), plot_base_ppt(), add_table_ppt() place formatted title text box content. New plot_multi_gg_ppt() function arrange multiple ggplot objects grid layout single PowerPoint slide. New plot_list_ppt() function create PowerPoint file one slide per plot list ggplot objects. New add_table_ppt() function render data frame formatted table PowerPoint slide (requires flextable package). New rasterize_geoms parameter plot_gg_ppt() selective geom rasterization: specify geom layers rasterize keeping rest vector graphics.

title: tgppt 0.0.10
text: Added rasterize_text parameter plot_gg_ppt() - rasterize_plot=TRUE, text grobs (geom_text, geom_label, geom_text_repel, etc.) now kept vector graphics default, making selectable editable PowerPoint. Added GitHub Actions CI/CD: R-CMD-check, pkgdown site deployment, test coverage, linting.

title: tgppt 0.0.9
text: Added option set temporary directory png files saved.

title: tgppt 0.0.8
text: Fix: changed template A4 # tgppt 0.0.7 Removed unused dependencies Added NEWS.md file track changes package.
